site.name: Quickler Reports
site.description: Chat-first technical reporting product for survey teams, engineers, and compliance professionals. Capture site notes, photos, and voice on site — Quickler structures them into a near-finished report.

product.name: Quickler Reports
target_users: technical teams with repeated reporting workflows
product.core_problem: Technical teams capture information on site in rough form, then return to a desk and rewrite it into a formal report. Quickler closes that gap.

pillars.name: Chat-first capture
pillars.description: Voice, photos, and text in a familiar chat workflow. No heavy app adoption burden on engineers. Natural capture during a live site visit.

pillars.name: Structured report drafting
pillars.description: Turns site capture into a near-finished report. Fits repeated technical report structures. Reduces copy-paste and rewrite time.

pillars.name: Human review before send
pillars.description: Engineer stays in control of the final output. Corrections can be made in plain language. Trust layer stays intact.

pillars.name: Routing and workflow underneath
pillars.description: Reports go to the right destination after approval. Project context and naming handled automatically.

good_fit: Technical teams that produce repeated site or inspection reports
Businesses where notes are captured on site and rewritten later at a desk
Leaders who want faster reporting without forcing staff into clumsy apps
not_a_fit: Teams looking for a broad enterprise platform from day one
Workflows with no repeated report structure at all
Use cases where trust, review, and evidence do not matter

proof.note: Working days calculated on 7.5-hour basis (37.5-hour working week)

case_studies.title: PO Workflow Platform
case_studies.outcome: End-to-end purchase order workflow with approvals, PDF generation, email routing, and document indexing.
case_studies.detail: Custom purchase order platform with guided form entry, saved vendors and addresses, and line-item memory. Approval routing by email, approver signature handling, branded PDF generation, and status tracking. Paperless indexing, history cloning, and setup automation.

case_studies.title: Fundraising Automation
case_studies.outcome: Grant application time reduced from 8 hours to 10 minutes per application. 6.5 working days saved per year.
case_studies.detail: Built a system storing the charity's core information and creating draft grant forms automatically. Staff enter project needs, get matching funders, and start from pre-filled applications instead of blank pages.

case_studies.title: Fundraising Automation — Small Charity
case_studies.outcome: 5.5 working days per year returned to core charitable work.
case_studies.detail: Process and tooling guidance eliminated roughly a week per year of repeat fundraising administration.

case_studies.title: Production Tracking Streamlining
case_studies.outcome: 2 hours per week of status chasing eliminated. 14 working days saved per year.
case_studies.detail: Book status was scattered across 5 spreadsheets. Built one tracker showing each book's stage, owner, and deadline with visual signals for at-risk items.

case_studies.title: Sales Data Restructuring
case_studies.outcome: 2 hours saved per week. 14 working days per year. Reporting adopted again after being avoided.
case_studies.detail: Sales data trapped in 43,000 formulas across multiple spreadsheets. Rebuilt underlying data structure and moved calculations into Looker Studio for non-technical staff.

case_studies.title: Till Data Automation
case_studies.outcome: 100 minutes saved per week. 11.5 working days recovered per year.
case_studies.detail: Automated Google Sheets processing of raw till exports. Northern Ireland fully automatic, Scotland workflow reduced to ~20 minutes weekly.
